category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Uruguay EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入乌拉圭：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入烏拉圭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Uruguay UNIT standards practice, URSEA regulatory oversight, UTE grid and public charging coordination, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与乌拉圭UNIT标准实践、URSEA监管、UTE电网及公共充电协调、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與烏拉圭UNIT標準實踐、URSEA監管、UTE電網及公共充電協調、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Uruguay, the confirmed practical gaps are IEC-family safety and EMC evidence aligned with UNIT standards practice, connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 for European-style public infrastructure, UTE grid-connection and charging-network coordination, URSEA-regulated electrical-service context, and OCPP/back-office interoperability where chargers are networked. Uruguay operates on 230 V / 400 V, 50 Hz, so frequency is aligned with China but voltage range, three-phase ratings, protective devices, and installation documentation still require confirmation. Uruguay's public EV direction is helped by UTE's charging network and very high renewable-electricity share, but that market context does not make GB/T connector chargers plug-compatible or waive conformity, utility, tender, or site-acceptance requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入乌拉圭时，已确认的实务差距包括：符合UNIT标准实践的IEC体系安全及EMC证据；面向欧洲式公共基础设施，须将接口从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；须与UTE电网接入和充电网络协调；处于URSEA监管的电力服务环境；联网充电桩还须满足OCPP/后台互操作。乌拉圭电网为230 V / 400 V、50 Hz，频率与中国一致，但仍须确认电压范围、三相额定值、保护器件和安装文件。UTE公共充电网络和极高比例的可再生电力推动乌拉圭电动汽车市场，但该市场背景并不会使GB/T接口充电桩具备物理兼容性，也不会豁免合格评定、公用事业、招标或站点验收要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入烏拉圭時，已確認的實務差距包括：符合UNIT標準實踐的IEC體系安全及EMC證據；面向歐洲式公共基礎設施，須將接口從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；須與UTE電網接入和充電網絡協調；處於URSEA監管的電力服務環境；聯網充電樁還須滿足OCPP/後台互操作。烏拉圭電網為230 V / 400 V、50 Hz，頻率與中國一致，但仍須確認電壓範圍、三相額定值、保護器件和安裝文件。UTE公共充電網絡和極高比例的可再生電力推動烏拉圭電動汽車市場，但該市場背景並不會使GB/T接口充電樁具備物理兼容性，也不會豁免合格評定、公用事業、招標或站點驗收要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, UNIT standards determination, URSEA ruling, UTE grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, tender qualification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Uruguay conformity assessment rules, UNIT standard adoptions, URSEA requirements, UTE project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、UNIT标准适用裁定、URSEA裁定、UTE并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定、投标资格或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行乌拉圭合格评定规则、UNIT标准采纳情况、URSEA要求、UTE项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、UNIT標準適用裁定、URSEA裁定、UTE併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、投標資格或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏拉圭合格評定規則、UNIT標準採納情況、URSEA要求、UTE項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
